overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a residential district at night, transitioning from a house backyard to city streets with a prominent circular stadium structure visible in the distance, then proceeding along palm-lined roads with industrial elements and power lines.

agents.ego_description: navigating around a residential house with turquoise door, moving through overgrown grass and side yards

notable_agents.action: NPC in white clothing standing near the house entrance before moving out of frame

entered.detail: two-story residential building with distinctive turquoise front door and lit windows
large satellite dish with red lights mounted on the roof of the house
wooden covered porch with steps leading to the house entrance
tall unkempt grass and vegetation in the backyard area
wooden privacy fence marking the property boundary

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a residential backyard at night, navigating around a house with a turquoise door and satellite dish on the roof. The area is overgrown with grass and vegetation, with artificial lighting from the house illuminating the scene. An NPC in white clothing is briefly visible near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential side path with covered walkway

events.description: circular neon-lit stadium structure becomes visible in the distance beyond the residential buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of a house with a covered porch, approaching the street with the cityscape revealing itself

entered.detail: large circular building with bright neon advertising screens and distinctive ring structure
tall palm trees lining the street ahead
manicured hedge bushes along the property line
concrete sidewalk leading toward the street intersection

segments.scene_description: Moving along a residential side path with a covered porch on the left, the scene opens up to reveal a massive circular stadium with neon lights in the distance. Palm trees and hedges line the approach to the street, transitioning from enclosed backyard to semi-open urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with neon-lit stadium

events.description: crossing the street at intersection alongside other pedestrians
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the main road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection near the large circular stadium, navigating through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white cap and shorts walking across the street while looking at phone
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the intersection in the same direction

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crosswalk with white stripes across the asphalt
multi-lane city street with traffic markings
commercial building facade with illuminated windows facing the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with the neon-lit stadium prominent on the left. The camera crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, then turns to follow the road lined with palm trees. Vehicles are visible on the road, and the atmosphere is distinctly urban with mixed residential and commercial elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban road with industrial power infrastructure

events.description: vehicles passing by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a multi-lane road with industrial structures and power lines visible ahead, moving toward a large crane structure

notable_agents.action: dark colored van driving past on the road heading in the opposite direction
pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines stretching across the road
large industrial crane structure with red lights visible in the distance
tall concrete retaining wall running alongside the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a multi-lane road flanked by a concrete wall on the right and power lines on the left. The circular stadium is no longer visible, replaced by industrial infrastructure including transmission towers and a large crane structure in the distance. Vehicles pass by on the road as the camera continues forward through this more industrial urban zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded residential backyard into a sprawling, neon-lit industrial urban landscape at night. It begins by navigating through overgrown grass and vegetation beside a house with a turquoise door, passing a figure in white clothing near the entrance. As the camera moves along a side path with a covered porch, the enclosed space opens up to reveal a massive, neon-lit circular stadium looming in the distance beyond a line of palm trees and hedges. The scene then expands into a wide urban intersection where the camera crosses the street among pedestrians before following a palm-lined road. Finally, the view shifts away from the stadium toward a multi-lane road flanked by concrete walls and power lines, moving deeper into an industrial zone characterized by transmission towers and a distant crane.
